author: y4rr
content: 11-commit audit-response wave landed on main: chore(audits) audit doc; feat(ferrotorch-jit) cranelift-jit replacing C-codegen shellout (pure-Rust in-process JIT); feat(ferrotorch-mps) lying-success init removal; feat(ferrotorch-distributions) opt-in fallback per rust-gpu-discipline §3; feat(ferrotorch-gpu) ADR #663 items 5+8 (has_inf_nan_f32 required trait + GpuRngState encapsulation); feat(ferrotorch-core) audit response (numeric_cast helper + fallible storage siblings + gpu_dispatch encapsulation + cond_scan deletion); feat(ferrotorch-vision) audit response (~80 NumCast migrations + 11 Result constructors + 4 non_exhaustive value types); feat(ferrotorch-optim) audit response (silent fallback opt-in + ParamGroup encapsulation + 17 *Config non_exhaustive + 16 SAFETY substantiation + 45 NumCast migrations); feat(ferrotorch-llama) audit response (lints + thiserror + manual Debug + non_exhaustive + categorical map_gpu_err + 4 NumCast + 5 Category C grammar invariants + GPU smoke test on real RTX 3090); feat(ferrotorch-cubecl) device-resident XPU storage handle (#673); chore(workspace) plumbing + public_surface tests + cascades. cargo build --workspace PASS at HEAD. Branch is 11 commits ahead of origin/main. Tracked follow-ups: #677 (jit rustdoc), #687 (real GPU has_inf_nan_f32 kernel), #692 (with_* builders for 17 optim configs), #694 (5 optim Arc-aliasing API-shape concerns), #696 (Optimizer::state_dict trait → FerrotorchResult), #699 (FerrotorchError::Gpu source-chain variant). Unaudited GPU-discipline §3 violator crates remaining: ferrotorch-gpu (65+ silent-fallback sites in kernels.rs — the big one), ferrotorch-cubecl (per-op host-readback in elementwise ops), ferrotorch-jit (InductorTarget::GpuCuda CPU interpreter fallback), ferrotorch-distributed (gpu_collective.rs CPU round-trip), ferrotorch-xpu (per-op readback).
